name: Zhejiang Shengda Bio-Pharm Co., Ltd.
summary: Zhejiang Shengda Bio-Pharm Co., Ltd. engages in the research, development, production, and sale of food and feed additives worldwide. The company offers vitamins, such as biotin and folic acid, etc.; biological fresh-keeping agents, including nisin and natamycin; and intermediate APIs. It also produces natural food preservatives. The company is based in Tiantai, China.
